title: Controlled Substances and Cannabis Branch: Branch Operational Support Services - Canada.ca
content:
## Controlled Substances and Cannabis Branch: Branch Operational Support Services
The Branch Operational Support Services Division  provides corporate support and planning to the Controlled Substances and  Cannabis Branch.
The division plays an  integral role within the branch and provides leadership, oversight and services  to support the consistent and effective management of operations, resources and  branch-wide initiatives.
The division oversees and coordinates the branch’s daily activities in key  areas such as:
- workforce initiatives
- operational planning
- litigation coordination
- finance and human resources
- access to information and privacy
- information and records management
- staff engagement and communications
- coordination of information technology and systems
Branch  Operational Support Services Division Controlled Substances and Cannabis Branch Health Canada Address locator: 5004A Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0K9
E-mail: cscbbossdirector.dgsccssodgdirecteur@hc-sc.gc.ca
